completed_stages.title: Admin + Editor Login, Role and Credential Architecture
completed_stages.result: Admin/Editor roles, bootstrap credential doctrine, first-login reset doctrine, Editor manual creation/correction rights and Admin decision rights defined.

completed_stages.title: Admin and Editor Login UI Scaffold
completed_stages.result: Admin/Editor visual scaffold pages created with no real credentials or active authentication.

completed_stages.title: Admin Editor UI Scaffold Route Separation Audit
completed_stages.result: Product decision recorded: public Sign in / Join and internal Admin/Editor route must remain separate.

completed_stages.title: Public Sign-in and Internal Admin Route Separation Apply
completed_stages.result: signin.html created/restored as public route; admin.html preserved as internal Admin/Editor route.

completed_stages.title: Admin Editor Decision and Submission Workflow Model
completed_stages.result: Admin actions and Editor submission/correction workflow modelled; Editor publishing blocked.

completed_stages.title: Workflow Model Audit and Secure Action Handler Readiness
completed_stages.result: Workflow audit passed; secure action-handler requirements and hybrid GitHub-first/Supabase-later strategy recorded.

completed_stages.title: Secure Action Handler Architecture Plan
completed_stages.result: Server-side action-handler architecture, GitHub-backed static contract, secret/role plan and audit sequence defined.

completed_stages.title: Secure Action Handler Architecture Audit and Implementation Readiness
completed_stages.result: Architecture audit passed; approved only non-active scaffold; live implementation blocked.

completed_stages.title: Secure Action Handler Non-active Implementation Scaffold
completed_stages.result: Non-active scaffold created outside /api with request/response schemas, role allowlist and disabled guard.

completed_stages.title: Secure Action Handler Non-active Scaffold Audit and Closure
completed_stages.result: Non-active scaffold audit passed with zero failed checks; AG14Z chain closure boundary created.
